channel.title: Blogs on Leon Weber
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Leon Weber

item.description: In Layman’s Terms: Semi-Open Relation Extraction from Scientific Texts Ruben Kruiper, Julian Vincent, Jessica Chen-Burger, Marc Desmulliez, Ioannis Konstas https://virtual.acl2020.org/paper_main.137.html RE: Only a few relations Open IE: Not well suited for scientific texts, because of highly complex text Proposal semi-open IE: Remove low-quality results from OpenIE with the help of a supervised RE model Application to extract trade-off relations from biology texts Clinical Concept Linking with Contextualized Neural Representations Elliot Schumacher, Andriy Mulyar, Mark Dredze https://virtual.
